name: Guan Suo | Shu
description:
Once lost, then found, into shoes he’s not sure he fits-- Hua Guan Suo.

Dynasty Warriors version.

~

The son of the God of War wonders if he’ll ever truly fit that name, among the dense jungles of Nanzhong.

~

Guan Suo! I pretty much had zero care for him as a character, but reading more into his fictional background and DW events (alongside his siblings) gave me a really good sense of a storyline and how to build him as an actually compelling character. Adoption trauma is Real and Guan Suo likely is the epitome of it. Really think the games should’ve mentioned the whole “yeah I got separated from my family and adopted by a different family and now I’m back with my birth family but it still feels Wrong” thing more.

For those who read these and are wondering about the janitor exodus and my stance or whatever-- I mainly use sillytavern plus the arliai proxy these days, so I just kinda... don’t use janitor much anyways?  Anyways, I’m likely going to publish all the DW bots here, and all my cards are on chub. My google site has been updated with the cards too, for those folks that don’t wanna wander through the hellscape that is chub. 

And of course: you’re always welcome to copy my bot descriptions, tag me in the arli ai discord/PM me on reddit to ask for a card, or yoink the already-existing (but outdated) cards from janny. I’m one of those folks who share anything when it comes to AI stuff, so I don’t mind!

Mild warnings for how this is literally taking place in a brutal, sexist, chaotic wartime period.
creator: Clementine00
